_meta.description: Universal expression base — cross-industry transition phrases and forbidden expressions. Merged into every L2 audience profile at runtime via merge_expression_layers().
_meta.distillation_rule: Iron Law: 'Switch from medicine to beauty/auto/finance — does it still work? YES → L1'
_meta.merge_behavior: universal_additions.transition_phrases are PREPENDED to each L2 profile's transition_phrases. universal_additions.forbidden_expressions are PREPENDED to each L2 profile's forbidden_expressions.
